title: Add Verific/SVA support for "always" and "nexttime" properties

features.name: assert property with clocking event and implication
features.description: Code should include an assert property statement with a clocking event and implication operator
features.snippet: assert property (@(posedge clk) reset |-> always nexttime counter <= MAX_COUNT);

features.name: always property operator
features.description: Code should include an SVA always property operator that requires a condition to hold for all subsequent clock cycles

features.name: nexttime property operator
features.description: Code should include an SVA nexttime property operator that requires a condition to hold in the next clock cycle
